chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1791 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7736/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.7737/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.02.2024 None present. No intimation is received. On the last date of hearing also no one was present. Hence, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
